DCDCOBC_BBG_EurStep2_V1.0

System Identification and Configuration Data

Metadata

File reference DCDCOBC_BBGEur_ACCHG_V1.0_20200901T143639.json
Source type JSON Data Array
Status
Validated

Technical Warning

Ensure specific OBD protocol matching before hardware implementation to avoid controller lockout.

Safety Guidelines →

OBD Configuration Details

Protocol CAN
Baudrate 10400
Send ID 756
Receive ID 776
Functional Addr 32
Functional Name Superviseur-DCDC

Automatic Identifiers

[
  {
    "diagversion": "5",
    "supplier": "EVTECH",
    "soft": "SWb20",
    "version": "REL20200817"
